src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Remove redundant comments and Javadoc from the main entry point to clean up the code.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.human_impl: Removed block comment above main method and inline comments explaining headless/web settings.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Update the global UI manager configuration to set a specific icon size for title panes.
Replace the application logo asset from a coffee shop icon to a Moe Moe logo with different dimensions.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.human_impl: Changed AppConstant.COFFEE_SHOP_ICON_PATH to AppConstant.MUSE_MOE_LOGO_PATH and resized from 100x100 to 512x512.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.general_idea: Remove redundant local UI configuration in favor of the global configuration set in the main method.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/App.java.human_impl: Removed UIManager.put("TitlePane.iconSize", new Dimension(20, 20)); from the login page initialization block.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/api/UserAPI.ja.general_idea: Remove the unused import for lombok.Getter as the associated inner class was deleted.
Add a new GET endpoint to retrieve a user by their email address.
Add a new PUT endpoint to update the last login time for the current user.
Refactor the password reset endpoint to use query parameters instead of a path variable and request body DTO.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/api/UserAPI.ja.human_impl:
@PutMapping("/reset_password")
public ResponseEntity<Boolean> resetPassword(@RequestParam Map<String, Object> params) { ... }

src/main/java/com/javaweb/api/UserAPI.ja.general_idea: Remove the PasswordResetRequest inner class as it is no longer used by the refactored endpoint.
Change the register user endpoint to return a boolean success status instead of just a 201 Created status.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/config/WebSecu.general_idea: Refactor Spring Security configuration to use lambda DSL and modern method signatures compatible with newer Spring Security versions.
Update permitted URL patterns to reflect the new domain model (songs/playlists instead of products/discounts).
Add custom success and failure handlers to return specific HTTP status codes for login attempts.
Enable HTTP Basic authentication with default configuration.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.general_idea: Remove unused javax.swing import to clean up the file.
Replace the existing color palette with a new dark/cherry-blossom themed set of colors.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.human_impl: public static final Color BACKGROUND_COLOR = Color.decode("#1A1A1A");

src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.general_idea: Remove the separate set of dark theme color constants, likely consolidating into the new primary theme.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.general_idea: Remove constants related to the reservation page, such as table colors and specific icon paths.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.human_impl: -    public static final Color RESERVED_TABLE_COLOR = Color.decode("#FFD700");

src/main/java/com/javaweb/constant/AppCo.general_idea: Replace the old role constants (Manager, Staff, etc.) with new ones (Admin, Free, Premium, Artist).

src/main/java/com/javaweb/controlleradvi.general_idea: Introduce a centralized ControllerAdvice to handle RuntimeException and generic Exception with structured JSON error responses.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/controlleradvi.human_impl: Added @ExceptionHandler methods for RuntimeException and Exception returning ResponseEntity<Map<String, Object>> with timestamp, status, error, message, and path.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Enti.general_idea: Add checked exceptions to the toDTO method signature to handle MP3 parsing errors.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Enti.human_impl: D toDTO(E entity) throws InvalidDataException, UnsupportedTagException, IOException;

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Enti.general_idea: Import classes from the mp3agic library to support the new exception types.
Import java.io.IOException to support the new exception type in the method signature.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Role.general_idea: Rename the Role entity class to RoleEntity to align with naming conventions or architectural changes.
src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/Role.human_impl: Changed import and type references from 'Role' to 'RoleEntity' in RoleConverter.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/User.human_impl: Set<String> roleDTOS = entity.getRoles() != null ? entity.getRoles().stream().map(role -> "ROLE_" + role.getCode())...

src/main/java/com/javaweb/converter/User.general_idea: Remove RoleConverter dependency from UserConverter to reduce coupling.
Simplify avatar handling by setting it to null if not provided, removing default constant usage.
Refactor role assignment logic to assign a default FREE role if no roles are requested.
Set a default preferred language for new users.
Clean up and consolidate imports, removing unused ones and grouping others.

src/main/java/com/javaweb/entity/BaseEnt.general_idea: Consolidate individual javax.persistence imports into a wildcard import for brevity.
Enable automatic tracking of creation and update timestamps for entities using JPA lifecycle callbacks.
